title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
abstract: arXiv:2606.26260v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model.

Title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
Abstract: arXiv:2606.26260v1 Announce Type: cross  Abstract: In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. translated_title: 用于预测激光焊接熔深与焊缝形态的多任务时空深度神经网络
translated_abstract: 在激光穿透焊接中，熔透状态和焊缝形态的评估对于确定焊接质量起着关键作用。本文全面介绍了一种创新的多任务深度学习模型，该模型能够高精度地预测熔透状态、熔深以及焊缝形态。监测平台依赖于利用互补金属氧化物半导体相机在激光焊接过程中捕获的熔池图像。所提出的模型融合了从顶部熔池图像中提取的时空特征以及焊接参数，建立了一个基于卷积神经网络和状态空间模型的深度学习框架，以更高效地提取和处理时空信息。此外，还提出了一种可靠的数据集构建方法，以增强所开发模型的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
tldr: 提出了一种融合熔池图像时空特征与焊接参数的多任务深度学习模型，通过卷积神经网络和状态空间模型高效预测激光焊接的熔深与焊缝形态，并采用可靠的数据集构建方法提升模型鲁棒性。
en_tdlr: A multi-task deep learning model integrating spatiotemporal features from weld pool images and welding parameters is proposed to predict penetration depth and weld morphology in laser welding, using CNNs and state space models for efficient processing and a robust dataset construction method to enhance generalization.
